close_reason: Added parse_key/1 function with TDD - 13 new tests, all passing
description:
system_keys.ex has key GENERATION functions but merge_fn needs PARSING functions.

## Current State

Key generation exists:
```elixir
def layout_log(log_id), do: "\xff/system/layout/logs/#{log_id}"
def shard_key(end_key), do: "\xff/system/shard_keys/#{end_key}"
```

## What's Missing

Key parsing for merge_fn:
```elixir
def parse_key("\xff/system/layout/logs/" <> log_id), do: {:layout_log, log_id}
def parse_key("\xff/system/shard_keys/" <> end_key), do: {:shard_key, end_key}
def parse_key("\xff/system/layout/resolvers/" <> end_key), do: {:layout_resolver, end_key}
# etc.
```

## Why Needed

merge_fn receives mutations like:
- key: `\xff/system/layout/logs/log-abc123`
- value: (FlatBuffer encoded OtpRef)

It needs to:
1. Parse key → {:layout_log, "log-abc123"}
2. Decode value using OtpRef.decode/1
3. Update state.log_services["log-abc123"] = decoded_pid

## Files

- lib/bedrock/system_keys.ex - add parse_key/1 function

## Blocks

bedrock-jwii (merge_fn implementation)
title: Add key parsing functions to system_keys.ex
